value_metric: append-only DocumentVersion chain: history is never overwritten -- content_hash / status / doc_date / artifact_keys changes are recorded per version, giving recoverable content history and a per-version link to the preserved R2 raw artifacts (foundation for T026 version diff and T027 open snapshots)

cost_itemized_unknown_not_zero.human_maintenance: update migration/rollback + spec when adding version-chain columns; migration is authored + verified on an isolated copy only, not yet applied to production D1
